lock_breach_rules: Do not publish A-tier ML on a team whose opponent SP has ERA under 3.00 and K9 above 9.5 in the last 6 starts.
Do not publish A-tier K over 7.5 for any starter unless that starter has posted 8 or more K in 3 of last 5 starts.
Cap A-tier same-game correlated picks to 2 maximum (ML plus K on same game exceeds concentration threshold).

carryover_rules: When stacking K over and Under total on the same starter, require ERA below 3.50 in last 5 starts and minimum 5 innings pitched average in last 3 starts before publishing both as separate picks.
